action: Append a provenance-preserving continuity-index delta for the effective-queue precedence decision, reducer implementation, and unresolved runtime evidence.
selection_basis: M-004 completed the reducer but left the canonical continuity index ending at CM-0009, so the highest-priority continuity gap was durable indexing of that transition without rewriting prior records.

observed: canonical queue snapshot can lag append-only projections
M-004 reducer source and test contract are committed
continuity index previously ended at CM-0009
inferred: append-only deltas preserve temporal history better than silently replacing canonical index records
proposed: merge validated deltas into a generated canonical index only after deterministic validation
unresolved: authority and procedure for canonical index regeneration

privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata and abstract queue semantics only; no private chat, health or pet-health material, credentials, personal identifiers, or unreviewed uploads.
next_action: Add a deterministic continuity-index delta validator, run both it and the effective-queue reducer in a clean checkout, and retain exact-commit outputs before regenerating the canonical index.
